name: meeting2action
description: Turn meeting artifacts from many sources into grounded company actions.

interface.shortDescription: Convert meeting artifacts into grounded decisions, tasks, and CRM/doc updates.
interface.longDescription: Meeting2Action helps Codex adapt to whatever evidence exists after a meeting: Google Meet recordings, Zoom exports, iOS call notes, Signal summaries, transcripts, calendar events, chat recaps, or raw notes. It extracts source-grounded decisions, open questions, follow-ups, owners, and destination updates without assuming one capture pipeline.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Meeting2Action on the meeting we just had and tell me the decisions, follow-ups, and destination updates.
